celestial-keepers.name: Celestial Keepers
celestial-keepers.summary: Original guardians of Prime Companions; few remain; some are living memory or Star-fused.

hollow-ones.name: Hollow Ones
hollow-ones.summary: Ancient consumers of Rift energy; cannot create; followed the Star through space.

veiled-meridian.note: Background pressure; Seris not center stage

compact.name: Keeper Compact
compact.note: Mira's ethic carries to the sky
